# imager_image (Resource)

Uploads a Talos disk image (raw.xz) into Hetzner Cloud and creates a snapshot image.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "imager_image" "example" {
  image_url     = "https://example.com/hcloud-amd64.raw.xz"
  architecture  = "x86"
  location      = "fsn1"
  server_type   = "cx23"
  description   = "Talos snapshot image"
  labels        = { os = "talos" }
  timeouts      = { create = "10m" }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `architecture` (String) Hetzner snapshot architecture. Valid values: x86 or arm.
- `image_url` (String) Public HTTPS URL ending in .raw.xz.

### Optional

- `debug_skip_cleanup` (Boolean) Skip cleanup of temporary server and ssh key. Only use for debugging.
- `description` (String) Description applied to the resulting snapshot image.
- `labels` (Map of String) Additional labels applied to the resulting snapshot image.
- `location` (String) Hetzner location name for the temporary upload server. Defaults to fsn1.
- `server_type` (String) Hetzner server type name for the temporary upload server.
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `effective_labels` (Map of String) Labels currently set on the snapshot image.
- `id` (String) Hetzner snapshot image ID.
- `image_id` (String) Hetzner snapshot image ID (same as id).

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).
- `delete` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours). Setting a timeout for a Delete operation is only applicable if changes are saved into state before the destroy operation occurs.
- `read` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours). Read operations occur during any refresh or planning operation when refresh is enabled.
